---
title: "“Conflict as news and News as conflict: a multidimensional content analysis of TV news in Cyprus”"
author: "Milioni D., Doudaki V., Tsiligiannis P., Papa, V., and Vadratsikas, K."
date: 2015-01-01
description: "International Journal of Communication, 9, 752-772."
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/placeholder.png
---
